PROJECTS
Kidney Tumor Detection Using Deep Learning
- Developed an AI-powered medical imaging system using CNNs trained on over 12,500 medical images.
- Achieved 92% prediction accuracy.
- Built OpenCV preprocessing pipeline and TensorFlow/Keras implementation.
- Deployed web workflow for real-time prediction.

Intelligent Examination Submission Framework
- Developed a FastAPI-powered middleware platform integrating Moodle and PostgreSQL.
- Automated digital examination workflows and answer sheet processing.
- Designed secure, scalable REST API architecture.
